arts.ttl: Bayern Munich Face Tough Salary Challenge to Secure €60M-Rated Real Madrid, PSG Target
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain was interested in Dean Huijsen last summer as part of their defensive overhaul, but the Spanish center-back ultimately signed with AFC Bournemouth. If PSG targets him again, they’ll face stiff competition. arts.ttl: Arsenal, Man Utd Plot Major Move, Make Official Offers for £63M-Rated PSG Target
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain has been eyeing Victor Osimhen over the past couple of transfer windows, and with summer fast approaching, the rumors surrounding his future are intensifying. Currently at Galatasaray, Osimhen has rediscovered the form that made him one of the standout players of the 2022-23 season, attracting interest from top clubs across Europe. arts.ttl: Arsenal Divided Over €70M-Rated PSG, Nottingham Forest Target Ahead of Summer Window
arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers have locked in Matheus Cunha with a long-term contract extension, despite significant interest in him during the winter transfer window. However, speculation about his future remains ongoing. Cunha has become a key figure for Wolves, excelling in various attacking roles and making a noticeable impact. En difficulté lors de ses dernières sorties, Lucas Beraldo (21 ans, 25 matchs et 1 but toutes compétitions cette saison) ......

arts.ttl: How Paris Saint-Germain could win Ligue 1 title this weekend as unbeaten record looms
arts.sum: Sports Mole explains how Paris Saint-Germain could wrap up the Ligue 1 title with six games left to play this weekend.

arts.ttl: PSG want to go unbeaten to title - Luis Enrique
arts.sum: A fourth straight Ligue 1 title is just a draw away as Paris St Germain host Angers on Saturday, and coach Luis Enrique, who has found motivation pursuing higher goals, is relishing the prospect of becoming the first to finish the league unbeaten.

arts.ttl: Ligue 1 Predictions | Round 28: PSG look to wrap up title against Angers
arts.sum: Ligue 1 Predictions, Round 28 GFFN editor-in-chief Luke Entwistle and GFFN’s Raphaël Jucobin face off in our Ligue 1 predictions competition. It’s three points for a correct score, two points for a correct score difference, and one…

PSG are on the cusp of being crowned Ligue 1 champions and need only to avoid defeat to secure another title. Unbeaten at home in the league this season, they should feel confident about earning anoth...

arts.ttl: What Ousmane Dembele Said That Could Motivate Aston Villa for Champions League Tie
arts.sum: The international break has wrapped up, and club football is back in action, with the UEFA Champions League quarterfinals taking center stage. Paris Saint-Germain will face Aston Villa with a spot in the semifinals on the line. arts.ttl: PSG Poised to Pursue Barcelona Standout Amid Ousmane Dembele’s Cryptic Social Media Action
arts.sum: Last month, Ousmane Dembele, who has been in top form since the start of 2025, stirred up speculation by changing his Instagram profile picture to an old photo of himself and Gavi from their time together in Barcelona.
